prestazioni: Engine: 4G63T (7th-gen, 6-bolt crank, 85mm bore) with forged internals including Eagle H-beam connecting rods, JE 87mm forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), and ACL Race Series bearings for 1,000+ hp reliability. Turbocharger: Garrett GTX5533R Gen II with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and TiAL Q 50mm BOV, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and GReddy 4-1 equal-length tubular manifold.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID2000x injectors (2,000cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (Walbro 450LPH + AEM 340LPH), controlled via Link G4+ Xtreme standalone ECU with flex-fuel sensor and ethanol content logging. Upgraded fuel rails from Tomei and -8AN PTFE fuel lines with Earl’s Vapor Guard fittings.

Drivetrain & Handling: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the rear with a Cusco 1.5-way front LSD, paired with a Tilton 7.25" twin-disc clutch and billet flywheel. Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 9kg/mm rear springs, custom-valved for the Legnum’s 5-link rear setup. Brakes: AP Racing CP9430 front 6-pot calipers with 355mm 2-piece rotors and Ferodo DS2500 pads, rear CP5310 4-pot calipers with 330mm rotors.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Legnum-specific widebody kit (Version 3) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders (35mm wider front, 50mm wider rear). Rear wing: Voltex Type-3 GT wing with carbon fiber endplates and adjustable angle mounts for 15 degrees of adjustability.

Exterior: Full Respray in Mitsubishi ‘Pyrenees Black’ (code 58K) with 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on the roof and pillars. Lighting: Depo Racing JDM-style LED taillights with sequential turn signals and Hella 500FF Series HID projectors in the OEM housings (5,000K). Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 18x10.5 +15 front and 18x11 +20 rear, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (265/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara with red stitching. Custom roll cage: Custom Cages bolt-in 8-point cage with gusseted main hoop and harness bar, powder-coated in gloss black. Steering: NRG Innovations Quick Release hub with a Momo Mod.78 350mm suede wheel. Gauges: Defi Advance BF series 60mm oil pressure, boost, and EGT gauges mounted in a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod.
